hero.title: Reduce image size without losing quality.
hero.subtitle: Fast, easy and private. Your images never leave your computer.

promo.card1_desc: We reduce file weight while keeping the image beautiful and sharp.
promo.card2_desc: Works with JPG, PNG, WebP and even new formats like AVIF.
promo.card3_desc: No ads, no registration and no complexity. Just drag and drop.

app.queue_hint: Drag more images or adjust the controls to the side.

engine.init_desc: Or click to select from your computer.
engine.error_fallback: Something went wrong. Try another format.
engine.format_hint_max_compression: Tip: WebP and AVIF usually make files much smaller.

how.title: How it works
how.page_intro: Everything happens inside your own browser, without sending anything to the internet.
how.step1_desc: The system understands the colors and details of your original image.
how.step2_desc: We remove unnecessary data to make the file light.
how.step3_desc: You download the image ready to use on your site or social network.

formats.title: Formats
formats.page_intro: Different file types for different needs.
formats.modern: New formats that make your site much faster.
formats.auto_desc: The system automatically chooses the best format for each image.
formats.visual_legacy_desc: To ensure everyone can see, even on old systems.
formats.visual_modern_desc: The best choice for modern sites and fast apps.
formats.visual_auto_desc: We test and deliver the smallest possible file.

privacy.title: Total Privacy
privacy.description: Your images never leave your computer. We have access to nothing.
privacy.note: No accounts, no passwords and no data collection. Just use it.
privacy.local_desc: Processing is done by your own browser, instantly.
privacy.boundary_desc: You can even use it without internet after loading the page for the first time.
privacy.visual_memory_desc: Ideal for personal photos or sensitive work documents.
privacy.visual_trust_desc: The code is open and anyone can check how it works.

faq.title: Common Questions
faq.q1: Is it safe to use personal photos?
faq.a1: Yes! Since nothing is sent to the internet, only you have access to the photos.
faq.a2: Yes. Once opened, the tool works fully offline.
faq.a3: None. You can use it as many times as you want, with as many images as you need.
faq.intro: Quick answers so you don't waste time.
faq.card_desc: See the most common questions below.
faq.support_desc: If you find any problem, you can let us know on GitHub.

about.intro_title: Compression that respects you and your images.
about.intro_desc: We created Imaginizim to be the simplest and most direct tool to use. No complication, no registration and no tricks.
about.flow_desc: Three quick steps for you to solve your problem right now.
about.privacy_title: Real privacy, not just a promise.
about.privacy_desc: Unlike other sites, we don't collect your data and we don't see your photos. Everything is under your control.
about.support_desc: If you are a developer or found a bug, you can help us on GitHub.
about.title: About Imaginizim
about.description: A free and simple tool to help designers and developers make the web lighter.
about.note: Our focus is to be useful, fast and respect your privacy above all.
about.visual_web_desc: Access from anywhere, without installing anything.
about.visual_core_desc: We are working to bring this ease to your desktop too.

footer.caption: Shrink your images fast, privately and easily.

preview.title: View Result
preview.help_split: Drag the center line to see the difference.
preview.help_overlay: Change the transparency to see what changed.
